CVE-2020-12243.title: In filter.c in slapd in OpenLDAP before 2.4.50, LDAP search filte ...
CVE-2020-12243.summary: In filter.c in slapd in OpenLDAP before 2.4.50, LDAP search filters with nested boolean expressions can result in denial of service (daemon crash).

CVE-2020-25692.title: A NULL pointer dereference was found in OpenLDAP server and was f ...
CVE-2020-25692.summary: A NULL pointer dereference was found in OpenLDAP server and was fixed in openldap 2.4.55, during a request for renaming RDNs. An unauthenticated attacker could remotely crash the slapd process by sending a specially crafted request, causing a Denial of Service.

CVE-2020-25709.title: A flaw was found in OpenLDAP. This flaw allows an attacker who ca ...
CVE-2020-25709.summary: A flaw was found in OpenLDAP. This flaw allows an attacker who can send a malicious packet to be processed by OpenLDAP’s slapd server, to trigger an assertion failure. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to system availability.

CVE-2020-25710.title: A flaw was found in OpenLDAP in versions before 2.4.56. This flaw ...
CVE-2020-25710.summary: A flaw was found in OpenLDAP in versions before 2.4.56. This flaw allows an attacker who sends a malicious packet processed by OpenLDAP to force a failed assertion in csnNormalize23(). The highest threat from this vulnerability is to system availability.

CVE-2020-36221.title: An integer underflow was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 lea ...
CVE-2020-36221.summary: An integer underflow was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to slapd crashes in the Certificate Exact Assertion processing, resulting in denial of service (schema_init.c serialNumberAndIssuerCheck).

CVE-2020-36222.title: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to an ass ...
CVE-2020-36222.summary: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to an assertion failure in slapd in the saslAuthzTo validation, resulting in denial of service.

CVE-2020-36223.title: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to a slap ...
CVE-2020-36223.summary: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to a slapd crash in the Values Return Filter control handling, resulting in denial of service (double free and out-of-bounds read).

CVE-2020-36224.title: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to an inv ...
CVE-2020-36224.summary: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to an invalid pointer free and slapd crash in the saslAuthzTo processing, resulting in denial of service.

CVE-2020-36225.title: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to a doub ...
CVE-2020-36225.summary: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to a double free and slapd crash in the saslAuthzTo processing, resulting in denial of service.

CVE-2020-36226.title: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to a memc ...
CVE-2020-36226.summary: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to a memch->bv_len miscalculation and slapd crash in the saslAuthzTo processing, resulting in denial of service.

CVE-2020-36227.title: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to an inf ...
CVE-2020-36227.summary: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to an infinite loop in slapd with the cancel_extop Cancel operation, resulting in denial of service.

CVE-2020-36228.title: An integer underflow was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 lea ...
CVE-2020-36228.summary: An integer underflow was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to a slapd crash in the Certificate List Exact Assertion processing, resulting in denial of service.

CVE-2020-36229.title: A flaw was discovered in ldap_X509dn2bv in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 ...
CVE-2020-36229.summary: A flaw was discovered in ldap_X509dn2bv in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading to a slapd crash in the X.509 DN parsing in ad_keystring, resulting in denial of service.

CVE-2020-36230.title: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading in an ass ...
CVE-2020-36230.summary: A flaw was discovered in OpenLDAP before 2.4.57 leading in an assertion failure in slapd in the X.509 DN parsing in decode.c ber_next_element, resulting in denial of service.

CVE-2021-27212.title: In OpenLDAP through 2.4.57 and 2.5.x through 2.5.1alpha, an asser ...
CVE-2021-27212.summary: In OpenLDAP through 2.4.57 and 2.5.x through 2.5.1alpha, an assertion failure in slapd can occur in the issuerAndThisUpdateCheck function via a crafted packet, resulting in a denial of service (daemon exit) via a short timestamp. This is related to schema_init.c and checkTime.

CVE-2022-29155.title: In OpenLDAP 2.x before 2.5.12 and 2.6.x before 2.6.2, a SQL injec ...
CVE-2022-29155.summary: In OpenLDAP 2.x before 2.5.12 and 2.6.x before 2.6.2, a SQL injection vulnerability exists in the experimental back-sql backend to slapd, via a SQL statement within an LDAP query. This can occur during an LDAP search operation when the search filter is processed, due to a lack of proper escaping.

CVE-2023-2953.title: A vulnerability was found in openldap. This security flaw causes  ...
CVE-2023-2953.summary: A vulnerability was found in openldap. This security flaw causes a null pointer dereference in ber_memalloc_x() function.

CVE-2022-29155.title: In OpenLDAP 2.x before 2.5.12 and 2.6.x before 2.6.2, a SQL injec ...
CVE-2022-29155.summary: In OpenLDAP 2.x before 2.5.12 and 2.6.x before 2.6.2, a SQL injection vulnerability exists in the experimental back-sql backend to slapd, via a SQL statement within an LDAP query. This can occur during an LDAP search operation when the search filter is processed, due to a lack of proper escaping.

CVE-2023-2953.title: A vulnerability was found in openldap. This security flaw causes  ...
CVE-2023-2953.summary: A vulnerability was found in openldap. This security flaw causes a null pointer dereference in ber_memalloc_x() function.
